sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4743" key="a)lutarxi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλυτ-αρχία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n4743.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">office of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀλυτάρχης,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cod.Just.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36.1</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀλύτης.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
